testcase.name: getWorldNow

error.message: could not execute statement [ERROR: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "worlds_name_key" Detail: Key (name)=(Antica) already exists.] [insert into worlds (location,name,pvp_type) values (?,?,?) returning id]; SQL [insert into worlds (location,name,pvp_type) values (?,?,?) returning id]; constraint [worlds_name_key]
